/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWLIFT:09-03-20/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:15,000/BWNUM:3RD/X: 2ND OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/VD:HEARING DATE OF 10-01-20/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOPC/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANTSTAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:  NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 09-11-20/X: BAIL SET AT $15,000/X:(LOVE WAIVER)/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 09-03-20 IN M11 AND PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 10-01-20 IN M11/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PD MTS/X:SUBPOENAED RECORDS ARE RELEASED TO THEDEFENSE/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:15,000/BWNUM:1ST/CTORD:THIS CASE IS NOW IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/X: 2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL:CLARIFICATION OF RELEASE/DAWT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DATE OF 11-08-19 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/INTC/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:11-13-19/987,2/ACM/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/SA4:240 HYDEST,SF,CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH (A GPS DEVICE,) AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
